p2Plan.noActivitiesComment: CSV has an Energy Efficiency Policy and Management System to manage energy at the CSV Karr Gas Facility site in line with the International Standard for Energy Management Systems ISO 50001:2018. CSV employs an Energy Efficiency Manager who analyses Karrs data and looks for anomylies and opportunities to fix or improve our fuel gas usage on site and is building commercial project proposals for emission reduction initiatives.
